name: Paperclip-Podman-Env
postCreateCommand: rm -rf /workspace/paperclip-data && ln -s /home/node/paperclip-data /workspace/paperclip-data && echo '1. Đang clone Paperclip...' && git clone https://github.com/paperclip-ai/paperclip.git /workspace/paperclip && cd /workspace/paperclip && pnpm install && pnpm paperclipai onboard && echo '2. Cài đặt RTK...' && curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rtk-ai/rtk/refs/heads/master/install.sh | sh && rtk init -g --opencode && echo '3. Tải Caveman & Copy Custom Skills...' && git clone https://github.com/JuliusBrussee/caveman.git /tmp/caveman && mkdir -p /workspace/paperclip-data/skills && cp /tmp/caveman/*.md /workspace/paperclip-data/skills/ && cp /workspace/my-skills/*.md /workspace/paperclip-data/skills/ || true && echo '4. Cài đặt Cavemem (MCP Server)...' && npm install -g @juliusbrussee/cavemem
